subject: Investment Opportunity for LaQuinta Inn & Suites Ankeny
text:
This email was sent as HTML-only. To view it, please visit:
https://my.rcm1.com/handler/email.aspx?pv=IFUCz4bFW38Aj2oPtI1O5HXy4PlBSbD_e-3NDQXqkRT39fafhct7VxhCbrAQCdJRTc6hea3IHSbIF7036GVOHW6RctSZzUhFaB9IxnKLKh3__Sv5WXPYk2I0Ao6zi10a

		<title>Preview Email</title>
	</head>
	<body>
		<span style="margin: 0; padding: 0; font-size: 1px; mso-line-height-rule: exactly; line-height: 1px;color: #ffffff;">
                        
                    </span>
		<table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="border-collapse:collapse; height:100%; width:100%;">
			<tr>
				<td class="wrapper" align="center" valign="top" style="background-color:#ffffff;padding-bottom:0px;padding-left:0px;padding-right:0px;padding-top:0px; text-align:left;">
					<table class="force-row" align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="border-collapse:collapse; margin:0 auto;">
						<tr>
							<td class="email_border" align="top">
								<table class="email_wrapper force-row" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="height:auto; width:775px;">
									<tr>
										<td class="email_body" valign="top" style="background-color:#ffffff;">
											<table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" width="100%">
												<tr xmlns="">
													<td class="section_trouble_viewing" valign="top" style="background-color:transparent;padding-bottom:10px;padding-left:10px;padding-right:10px;padding-top:10px;">
														<table class="force-row" align="left" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="width:100%;">
															<tr>
																<td class="content" valign="top" style="background-color:transparent;padding-bottom:10px;padding-left:10px;padding-right:10px;padding-top:10px;">
																	<table class="force-row" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="width:100%;">
																		<tr>
																			<td class="trouble_viewing_copy" valign="top" style="font-family:Tahoma, sans-serif;color:#435254;font-size:10px;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;">
																				<div style="text-align:center;">
                                            Having trouble viewing this email? <a href="https://www.cbredealflow.com/handler/email.aspx?pv=IFUCz4bFW38Aj2oPtI1O5HXy4PlBSbD_e-3NDQXqkRT39fafhct7VxhCbrAQCdJRTc6hea3IHSbIF7036GVOHW6RctSZzUhFaB9IxnKLKh311c1jdVw0kq6DmJj1hPOb" target="_blank" style="color:#003f2d">View online instead</a>.
                                        </div>
																			</td>
																		</tr>
																	</table>
																</td>
															</tr>
														</table>
													</td>
												</tr>
												<tr xmlns="">
													<td class="section_main_header" valign="top" style="background-color:#003f2d;padding-bottom:20px;padding-left:28px;padding-right:28px;padding-top:20px;">
														<!--[if mso]>
                    <table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="width:100%;">
                    <tr>
                    <td valign="top" style="width:148px;">
                <![endif]-->
														<table class="force-row" align="left" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="display:inline-table;float:left;width:120px;">
															<tr>
																<td class="content" valign="top" style="background-color:transparent;">
																	<table class="force-row" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="width:100%;">
																		<tr>
																			<td class="image" align="left" valign="top" style="padding-bottom:0px; padding-left:0px; padding-right:20px; padding-top:22px;">
																				<img src="https://my.rcm1.com/files/wiCt6TCo4scfzY2z2k2mKVgzfQs78OQ4QwvzGhYmaMXrHRFchTbRu0yTWeskZMTJsDajW5zMXU466r1KEJtlNsYzo3qDAjY4l9qmzsROXB8.png" border="0" hspace="0" vspace="0" alt="cbre-logo.png" width="100" height="24" style="max-width:100px;width:100px;" />
																			</td>
																		</tr>
																	</table>
																</td>
															</tr>
															<tr>
																<td valign="top" style="line-height:10px; height:10px;"> </td>
															</tr>
														</table>
														<!--[if mso]>
                    </td>
                    <td valign="top" style="width:627px;">
                    <![endif]-->
														<table class="force-row" align="right" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="display:inline-table;float:right;width:599px;">
															<tr>
																<td class="content text" valign="top" style="background-color:transparent;padding-bottom:0px;padding-left:0px;padding-right:0px;padding-top:0px;">
																	<table class="force-row" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="width:100%;">
																		<tr>
																			<td class="main_heading" valign="top" style="background-color:transparent;font-family:Tahoma, sans-serif;color:#ffffff;font-size:27px;font-style:normal;font-weight:bold;padding-bottom:0px;padding-left:20px;padding-right:0px;padding-top:10px;text-align:right">LaQuinta Inn & Suites Ankeny</td>
																		</tr>
																		<tr>
																			<td valign="top" style="line-height:5px; height:5px;"> </td>
																		</tr>
																		<tr>
																			<td class="main_subheading" valign="top" style="background-color:transparent;font-family:Tahoma, sans-serif;color:#ffffff;font-size:16px;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;padding-bottom:0px;padding-left:20px;padding-right:0px;padding-top:0px;text-align:right">2402 SE Tones Dr, Ankeny, IA</td>
																		</tr>
																		<tr>
																			<td valign="top" style="line-height:20px; height:20px;"> </td>
																		</tr>
																	</table>
																</td>
															</tr>
														</table>
														<!--[if mso]>
                    </td>
                    </tr>
                    </table>
                <![endif]-->
													</td>
												</tr>
												<tr xmlns="">
													<td class="section_single_image" valign="top" style="background-color:transparent;padding-bottom:0px;padding-left:0px;padding-right:0px;padding-top:0px;">
														<table class="force-row" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="width:100%;">
															<tr>
																<td class="responsive-image image" align="center" valign="top">
																	<img src="https://my.rcm1.com/files/PmsGVAiSF4BRFEOB5O2_gswKpftxZJQP3KWrOkm256VpR0wo0Gh3AE_6sa9mXyedDL_iQljtFaxk56ASdXwMR33vkzCWIjKkSYCWP3mX_pWt_uzzBs9AFYtfa_BCLv_NXCg1nh26y0nGgeW4V50F8Q.png" border="0" hspace="0" vspace="0" alt="" width="775" height="436" style="max-width:1000px;width:775px;" />
																</td>
															</tr>
														</table>
													</td>
												</tr>
												<tr xmlns="">
													<td class="section_single_column" valign="top" style="background-color:transparent;padding-bottom:20px;padding-left:0px;padding-right:0px;padding-top:20px;">
														<table class="force-row" align="left" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="width:100%;">
															<tr>
																<td class="content" valign="top" style="background-color:transparent;padding-bottom:10px;padding-left:0px;padding-right:0px;padding-top:10px;">
																	<table class="force-row" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="width:100%;">
																		<tr>
																			<td class="section_heading" valign="top" style="
                                                background-color:#ffffff;
                                                font-family:Tahoma, sans-serif;
                                                color:#435254;
                                                font-size:19px;
                                                font-style:normal;
                                                font-weight:bold;
                                                padding-bottom:0px;
                                                padding-left:0px;
                                                padding-right:0px;
                                                padding-top:0px;
                                                text-align:left;
                                            ">The Offering</td>
																		</tr>
																		<tr>
																			<td valign="top" style="
                        line-height:10px;
                        height:10px;
                    "> 
                </td>
																		</tr>
																		<tr>
																			<td class="copy" valign="top" style="font-family:Tahoma, sans-serif;color:#435254;font-size:13px;"><div><span style="font-size:12.0pt">CBRE Hotels is pleased to present the opportunity to acquire </span><span style="font-size:12.0pt"><strong>LaQuinta Inn & Suites – Ankeny, IA, </strong></span><span style="font-size:12.0pt">a </span><span style="font-size:12.0pt"><strong>recently renovated, fee-simple, limited-service hotel </strong></span><span style="font-size:12.0pt">located in one of the fastest-growing suburbs of the Des Moines MSA. The property has undergone an extensive </span><span style="font-size:12.0pt"><strong>property-wide renovation, </strong></span><span style="font-size:12.0pt">offering a turn-key investment. This offering provides investors with well-located exposure to the Ankeny hotel market, benefiting from strong regional demographics, retail density, and proximity to major transportation corridors</span><br></div></td>
																		</tr>
																	</table>
																</td>
															</tr>
														</table>
													</td>
												</tr>
												<tr xmlns="">
													<td class="section_buttons" valign="top" style="background-color:transparent;padding-bottom:5px;padding-left:0px;padding-right:0px;padding-top:0px;
                ">
														<!--[if mso]>
                    <table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="width:100%;">
                    <tr>
                    <td valign="top" style="width:50%;">
                    <![endif]
                -->
														<table class="force-row" align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="display:inline-table;float:left;width:775px;
                    ">
															<tr>
																<td class="section-button-column" valign="top" style="
                                background-color:transparent;
                                padding-top:5px;
                                padding-right:0px;
                                padding-bottom:0px;

																		<tr>
																			<td class="copy" valign="top" style="font-family:Tahoma, sans-serif;color:#435254;font-size:13px;"><ul><li><span style="font-size:1.077em;"><strong>Change of Ownership PIP Available </strong></span></li><li><span style="font-size:1.077em;"><strong>Excellent Location just off of I-35 </strong>in one of the fastest growing suburbs in the Des Moines MSA. </span></li><li><span style="font-size:1.077em;">3-story, 75-room interior corridor hotel built in 2005 as a Holiday Inn Express and extensively renovated in 2022 when the hotel was converted to a LaQuinta Inn & Suites. Renovations included:  </span><ul><li><span style="font-size:1.077em;">All new guestroom soft goods</span></li><li><span style="font-size:1.077em;">New mattresses and box springs</span></li><li><span style="font-size:1.077em;">Fully renovated breakfast area and serving space</span></li><li><span style="font-size:1.077em;">New front desk area</span></li><li><span style="font-size:1.077em;">Newly added fitness room </span></li><li><span style="font-size:1.077em;">New business center</span></li><li><span style="font-size:1.077em;">Interior corridor upgrades with new wallpaper and carpet</span></li><li><span style="font-size:1.077em;">Exterior painting and decorative tile upgrades</span></li><li><span style="font-size:1.077em;">Building modifications on the side and back of building </span></li><li><span style="font-size:1.077em;">New dehumidifier in pool area installed in 2025</span></li></ul></li><li><span style="font-size:1.077em;"><strong>Fee-Simple Interest </strong></span></li><li><span style="font-size:1.077em;"><strong>Unencumbered by Management</strong></span></li><li><span style="font-size:1.077em;"><strong>Suburban Growth Market</strong></span>​​​​​​​</li></ul></td>

snippet: Having trouble viewing this email? View online instead. LaQuinta Inn & Suites Ankeny 2402 SE Tones Dr, Ankeny, IA The Offering CBRE Hotels is pleased to present the opportunity to acquire LaQuinta
